goal: Add a provider-neutral --review-text CLI input while preserving the legacy --gemini-review flag.
assumptions: --review-json remains the preferred structured input path.
--review-text carries inline Markdown/text content rather than a file path.
risks: Supplying both text aliases could make the chosen input ambiguous.
Changing --gemini-review behavior could break the workflow Markdown rollback path.
Provider-level Gemini naming remains a separate follow-up.
steps: Add failing e2e tests for --review-text and ambiguous aliases.
Run fmt, tests, clippy, reinstall, and doctor.
